summary: Iteration 34 - Fiches PDF Premium Visual Refonte Testing Complete. Fixed missing fees_currency field in ProcedureStep model. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend verified: CreateFichePage loads with premium design, Matrix.png logo in preview, per-step currency selector works, company settings sync correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - React hydration warning from visual editor wrapper, not affecting functionality

backend.POST /api/fiches with step currencies: PASS - Creates fiche with fees_currency per step (GNF/EUR/USD)
backend.POST /api/fiches/preview-pdf: PASS - Preview PDF without saving works
backend.Cleanup test fiches: PASS - TEST_ prefixed fiches cleaned up

frontend.CreateFichePage loads: PASS - Premium design with orange/white/black theme
frontend.Matrix.png logo in preview: PASS - Logo src='/Matrix.png' in preview panel
frontend.Sticky action bar: PASS - Back button, settings link, save button, generate PDF button all visible
frontend.Informations generales section: PASS - Title, country, category, type, currency, fees, delay, status fields
frontend.Step fees with currency selector: PASS - data-testid='step-fees-currency-0' works, can select GNF/EUR/USD
frontend.Company settings page: PASS - Logo URL shows /Matrix.png, company name 'Matrix News'

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX: Added missing 'fees_currency: str = ""' field to ProcedureStep model in /app/backend/models/fiche.py
BUG FIX: Updated pdf_generator.py to use step-level fees_currency instead of global currency for step fees display
pdf_generator.py load_logo() correctly reads from local static files (no HTTP requests)
CreateFichePage.js has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Company settings default logo_url is /Matrix.png (not nimba-logo.png)
seed_data_creation: Test fiches created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiches PDF premium refonte complete. Key changes: 1) fees_currency field added to ProcedureStep model for per-step currency selection. 2) pdf_generator.py uses step-level currency. 3) Matrix.png is the default logo (not nimba-logo.png). Routes: /admin/fiches/create, /admin/fiches/:id/edit, /admin/parametres-entreprise. All endpoints require admin auth.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB storage and ReportLab PDF generation
